goal: Produce a deep-dive audit of the current top 6 chips using live portfolio-v3 data plus fresh v2 checks.
constraints: Use the live 2026-03-21 portfolio snapshot as the ranking source
Separate structural hardening from deeper operating maturity
behavioral_changes: The repo now carries a dated deep-dive audit of the portfolio leadership tier.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from chip_labs.quality_rubric_v2 import score_chip_v2; ..." for each top-6 chip
follow_up: Use this deep dive to decide which chips should be used as transfer sources.
If needed, run the next tranche on the weakest dimensions across the top tier: doctrine quality, contradiction resolution, and realworld_validated coverage.
